title: All for One
description:
Deal 10 damage.
Put ALL 0-cost cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
upgraded_description:
Deal 14 damage.
Put ALL 0-cost cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: Only 0-cost Attack, Skill, and Power type cards from the discard pile are put into hand. X-cost cards are excluded.
